title: Armament rating
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''armament rating''' was a system used to rate both the offensive and defensive weaponry of a given ship. The rating was assigned to all [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]]. Factors that helped determine the rating were the type and number of weapons, the maximum firing range and power output capacity.

Generally accepted ratings were:
:'''0''' - No weapons
:'''1''' - Light defensive weapons only
:'''2''' - Light defensive and offensive capability
:'''3''' - Medium defensive and offensive capability
:'''4''' - Heavy defensive and offensive capability

{{Military-stub}}
